caption: Kim sent the Crane Street contract. Third clause is the usual reproduction grab. Going to redline it.
Every single time with that clause. Did you check the delivery timeline too?
September 3rd load-in, which is the first week of term. Inconvenient.
Very Kim of her. Are you going to do it anyway?
Probably. Six artists, decent wall space. Better than the Locust Street situation last year.
That bar was low tbh. What work are you submitting?
The three large panels from the spring studio block. They need to be seen somewhere.
They do. Fingers crossed she takes your redlines 🤞
